title: MC Journeys
description: Journeys is a questing pack for 1.20.1, featuring a large modlist, interplanetary travel, lots of biomes, machines, bosses, and most importantly for a questing pack, quests (over 400)! So join in the alpha today!
body:
Warning - Currently in alpha. Modlist and quests are subject to change, and worlds may be corrupted. Keep your backups!

Journeys is a 1.20.1 questing pack featuring more than 400 quests! From intergalactic travel, to creeper skeletons, this pack has the best 1.20.1 has to offer, all in a package that will lead you through the important bits. Just hop in and press the menu key in a world to explore! But not just that - this pack features exclusive endgame content handcrafted to give the pack a good ending. Currently implemented are the towers - rare structures with challenges inside to get to the top. In the future, you may find something special on the top, which will lead you into the endgame!

To be added -
Full endgame
More quests
Server build
